dataList.name: Wandering Ordeal
dataList.desc:
Upon entry, gain 1~3 [RunHallway]
Turn Start: At 0 [RunHallway], use 'Herd Migration'
(If this unit is Staggered, recover from Stagger when this effect triggers)

If 'BunBun' is on the battlefield, this passive does not activate
dataList.flavor: 'Ordeals are quite distinct from Abnormalities—they are vivid representations of intense traumas, dredged up at random from humanity's dreams that course through the farthest depths of this company.'

dataList.name: Tailored for the Palate
dataList.desc: On Attack Hit against a target with a damage type the target is "Weak" or "Fatal" (Resistance > 1) to, inflict 1 [Binding] next turn (once per Skill)
dataList.flavor: "How could such a flavorful beverage end up being called BongBong?"

dataList.name: The Secret of Taste
dataList.desc: Inflict 1 [PumpkinJelly] on the target that killed this unit

dataList.name: Wandering Ordeal
dataList.desc:
Encounter Start: Gain 3 [RunHallway]
Turn Start: At 0 [RunHallway], use 'Herd Migration'
(If this unit is Staggered, recover from Stagger when this effect triggers)

If there are no BongBongs left on the battlefield except for "BongBongs spawned by this unit", the Skill effects of 'Herd Migration' do not trigger, and this unit gains 3 [RunHallway] next turn
dataList.flavor: "These Ordeal things keep popping out from that murky-white smoke... just what is that smoke supposed to be, Captain?!"

dataList.name: Lasting Ordeal
dataList.desc:
Once 4 turns pass after this unit Retreats, this unit and all available "BongBongs spawned by this unit" Return to the battlefield. Then, gain 3 [RunHallway]

If all available combat participant spots are filled, Retreat a random BongBong unit and Return to the battlefield.

dataList.name: Fragile Orange Bubble
dataList.desc: When hit by Unopposed Attacks, take +100% damage When clashing against Skills that spend Ammo, Clash Power -3 and convert all Coins on its Attack Skills to Regular Coins.
dataList.flavor: "I know those carbonated bubbles are tasty, but be careful around them, okay? They're unprocessed and highly acidic. Sure, a few spatters of little BongBongs' pop bubbles might not be so dangerous, but getting doused in the undiluted fluid of those massive BunBuns'll melt you guys into a puddle."

dataList.name: Food Production
dataList.desc:
On Kill, summon 1 BongBong
Turn End: At 0 [RunHallway] Stack, summon as many BongBongs as possible next turn
dataList.flavor: "Apparently, they've got this special, top-secret carbonation formula. Like an in-house recipe."
